videos.transcript: Pesquisar transcrição I haven't seen her in over ten years. But I could tell she was coming from a thousand miles away. Why don't you start with why you're here? Sam. I need a dress. Look, you've come crawling back to me I had nowhere else to go. So tell me, what do you see in your head? Me? Oh, yes, I remember. This is all about you. What song are you singing? I’ll play it for you if you want. But I don’t want to break my streak. For what? Of not listening to your music. I didn't mean to cut you out. But you did. You can't really hate me. Oh, yes, I can. Is that what we're doing here? You're making me a hate dress? You'll see. We have a connection, and I can’t explain it. You think there's something inside of you? Let’s cast her out. Together. I don’t like this. It's what you really wanted. You went somewhere. I couldn't follow. Mother Mary. We’re reinventing you. That may only be one of us left standing when this is over. I know.

videos.transcript: Pesquisar transcrição -Yeah! What's up guys? It's your boy, Jack Black, and it's time to get ready with me because "Saturday Night Live"! It's a big show because the musical guest is my brother from another color, Jack White. And because I'm hosting the show for the one, two, three, four. Count 'em, fifth time! Let's go! Little loud. Okay. Louder. [ Gasps ] Hello, kitty. Cat on a cat. Meow. For shortened pants, I'm usually a jorts guy, but for "SNL", I'm going with the florts! Flaming shorts! I pull my tube socks up just below the calf so the ladies can peep my meaty grapefruits. And over the socks, you know I rock the crocs. Plata forma style. And finally, the age old question, bucket or beanie, beanie or bucket. Trick question. Bucket and beanie. Buckeanie. And don't forget a little zincy for my binkie. And now this peacock's ready to strut. -Oh, hey, Jack. -Ah, crumb! Now I got to change, and you got to shave. -Sure. This is just my promo beard anyway. Smells. Ugh.

videos.transcript: Pesquisar transcrição >>> WOW, BEV, PAT, YOU GUYS HAVE REALLY OUTDONE YOURSELVES. THE CHICKEN WAS AMAZING. >> OUR PLEASURE. YOU GUYS ARE WELCOME ANY TIME. >> TRUST US. WE'LL BE BACK. >> THANKS SO MUCH FOR WELCOMING ME. IT'S SO COOL TO FINALLY MEET HARRY'S FRIENDS. >> WELL, HE'S NEVER INTRODUCED US TO ANYONE BEFORE, SO IT'S CLEAR YOU'RE A VERY SPECIAL GAL. >> ALL RIGHT. WELL I HOPE YOU GUYS SAVED ROOM FOR FUN BECAUSE I PICKED UP THIS COOL NEW BOARD GAME FOR US THE TRY. IT'S CALLED TICKET TO RIDE. IT'S ABOUT TRAINS AND RAILROADS. I NEVER PLAYED BEFORE, BUT IT SEEPS LIKE A BLAST. >> I LOVE A NEW BOARD GAME. >> I'M SO IN. >> SOUNDS FUN. >> OH, WOW. OH. NO. NO. SORRY. >> OH, NINA, IS SOMETHING WRONG? >> SORRY. JUST I DON'T PLAY BOARD GAMES. YEAH. NO. >> OH, YEAH. SORRY, Y'ALL. NINA DOESN'T PLAY BOARD GAMES. SHE'S KIND OF FREAKED OUT BY THEM. >> BABE, YOU'RE MAKING IT SOUND LIKE I'M AFRAID OF BOARD GAMES. I'M NOT. >> YEAH. IMAGINE BEING AFRAID OF BOARD GAMES. >> RIGHT? NO, NO. I'M NOT AFRAID OF BOARD GAMES. I'M AFRAID OF GETTING JUMANJIED. >> OH. JUMANJIED? >> YEAH. YOU GUYS EVER SEEN THE FILM CALLED JUMANJI ABOUT THE GAME? >> YEAH, SURE. >> WELL, I JUST WANT TO BE CAUTIOUS PLAYING GAMES. I DON'T KNOW. LEST IT SHOULD JUMANJI ME. >> YOU MEAN THE FICTIONAL MOVIE ABOUT A MAGICAL GAME? >> I MEAN, JUMANJI IS A MOVIE. IT ISN'T REAL. >> YOU LITERALLY CAN'T PROVE THAT. >> UM, BABE, YOU'RE NOT GETTING JUMANJIED. >> I KNOW I'M NOT GETTING JUMANJIED BECAUSE I WILL NOT PUT MYSELF IN A POSITION TO BE JUMANJIED. >> JUMANJI ISN'T REAL, THOUGH. EVEN IF JUMANJI WERE REAL, THIS ISN'T JUMANJI, IT'S TICKET TO RIDE. >> A GAME DOESN'T HAVE TO BE JUMANJI FOR THAT GAME TO JUMANJI ME. JUST HOW GETTING ROOFFY DOESN'T HAVE TO BE A ROOFIE. >> I SAW JUMANJI AND THEY GET SUCKED INTO A VIDEO GAME. >> WHAT? >> THE ROCK AND KEVIN HART. >> COME ON, BEVERLY, WE'RE NOT TALKING ABOUT THE NEW JUMANJI. WE'RE TALKING ABOUT THE TRUE JUMANJI. JUMANJI, JUMANJI. >> SO YOU HAVE SEEN IT. AND YET YOU'RE STILL TRYING TO JUMANJI ME. >> OKAY. WHAT EVEN IS JUMANJI TO YOU, LADY? BECAUSE IT SOUNDS LIKE YOU THINK JUMANJI IS GOING INTO JUMANJI, BUT IN JUMANJI, JUMANJI COMES OUT. THE KIDS DON'T GO INTO JUMANJI, JUMANJI COMES OUT OF JUMANJI. >> ROBIN WILLIAMS GOES INTO JUMANJI. >> ONE GUY. THE REST OF JUMANJI IS JUMANJI COMES OUT. >> YOU'RE YELLING. >> I'M JUST SAYING, SHE DOESN'T KNOW WHAT SHE'S TALKING ABOUT. WHICH IS IT? ARE YOU AFRAID OF BEING JUMANJIED INTO JUMANJI OR JUMANJI THAT COMES OUT? >> JUMANJI IS A SERIES OF JUNGLE EMERGENCIES. THAT SIR, IS JUMANJI, AND WE ARE NOT PREPARED FOR THAT. WE HAVE NO MEDICINES. WE HAVE NO ROPE. >> THAT'S NOT EVEN WHAT WOULD HAPPEN IF WE GOT JUMANJIED INTO THIS TRAIN BECAUSE THIS GAME IS TRAINS. >> IF I GOT JUMANJIED INTO MONOPOLY, IT'S BE THE MUSTACHE MAN, NOT JUNGLE EMERGENCY. >> OH, SO NOW EVERYONE'S AN EXPERT ON JUMANJI? BECAUSE FIVE F'ing SECONDS AGO, YOU ALL ACTED LIKE I WAS A NUT. >> I AMENT THE MAN OF THIS HOUSE, AND I WANT TO PLAY THE GAME I GOT FROM THE OLD LADY AT THE ESTATE SALE. WE ARE PLAYING THIS DAMN GAME. OKAY. JUST BECAUSE FOG IS COMING OUT OF THE BOX DOES NOT MEAN WE'RE GETTING JUMANJIED. WE'RE NOT GETTING JUMANJIED. >> WE GETTING JUMANJIED. >> I KNEW IT! >> BABE, WHAT'S HAPPENING? >> ARR! >> ALL RIGHT. THAT'S MY BAD, Y'ALL. >> WELL, WELL, WELL. WELCOME TO TICKET TO RIDE. WE GOT A RAILROAD TO BUILD. AND IF ANY OF YOU TRY TO LEAVE, YOU'LL BE TIED TO THE TRACKS AND LEFT FOR THE COYOTES. EXCEPT FOR YOU BECAUSE YOU SPECIFICALLY SAID YOU DID NOT WANT TO BE JUMANJIED INTO TRAIN GAME. YOU ARE FREE TO GO. >> YES! I KNEW IT. I'M FREE. AND HARRY, I DON'T THINK THIS IS GOING TO WORK OUT BECAUSE IT SEEMS LIKE YOU AND ALL YOUR FRIENDS ARE GOING TO DIE. >> AWW, YOU LOST YOUR GIRL. THAT'S TOO BAD. BUT, HEY, JUST REMEMBER, IF YOU LOSE THE GAME, YOU DIE IN REAL LIFE. HOPE THAT HELPS. ALL ABOARD!

videos.title: Jumanji
videos.description: O jovem Alan Parrish descobre um misterioso tabuleiro de jogo que magicamente o transporta para as desconhecidas selvas de JUMANJI por 26 anos até que duas inocentes crianças, Judy (Kirsten Dunst de Homem-AranhaTM 1 & 2) e Peter (Bradley Pierce), o libertam do poderoso feitiço do jogo. Agora um adulto, Alan, (Robin Williams de Robôs, Uma Babá Quase Perfeita) se reúne com sua amiga de infância, Sarah (Bonnie Hunt de Doze é Demais), e com Judy e Peter, tenta superar as poderosas forças do jogo nesta criativa aventura que combina efeitos especiais de tirar o fôlego com comédia, magia e arrepios!
